title: State Error Isolation Risks
findings: 发现 2 个未登记的 state/error isolation 风险：shutdown drain 单槽等待器会在跨信号并发时覆盖等待状态；metrics flush window 使用全局 interval，跨 projectRoot 串状态。
issues_found: [{"title":"In-flight drain uses a single waiter slot, so concurrent shutdown drains can overwrite each other","severity":"medium","description":"createShutdownHandler is per-signal, so SIGTERM and SIGINT handlers can both enter the first-invocation path and call tracker.drain concurrently. The tracker stores only one resolveDrained callback; the later drain overwrites the earlier one, so when active requests exit only the newest waiter resolves immediately while the earlier shutdown path waits until its deadline and may then run fsync/flush/close/exit out of phase with the other handler.","location":"packages/server/src/services/in-flight-tracker.ts:10","fix_direction":"Represent drain waiters as a Set/array and resolve all pending waiters when active.size reaches 0, or centralize shutdown dedup across all signals so only one drain can be active; add a regression test for concurrent drain() calls before the final exit().","affected_components":["packages/server/src/services/in-flight-tracker.ts","packages/server/src/index.ts","server shutdown"],"tags":["state-error-isolation","shutdown-race","global-state"]},{"title":"Metrics flush window is global mutable state shared across project roots","severity":"low","description":"startMetricsFlush stores each root's timer in flushTimers, but also writes the selected interval to the module-level flushIntervalMs. flushMetrics later labels rows with options.windowMs ?? flushIntervalMs, so starting a second projectRoot with a different interval changes the window label used by manual/final flushes for every other project even though counters are per-project.","location":"packages/server/src/services/metrics.ts:43","fix_direction":"Store interval/window metadata per projectRoot alongside each timer, or pass the captured interval into every timer and stop-handle flush; add a test that starts two roots with different intervals and verifies each emitted row keeps its own window.","affected_components":["packages/server/src/services/metrics.ts","metrics.jsonl","multi-project server state"],"tags":["state-error-isolation","state-leak","metrics"]}]
